expectations.text: Output identifies at least one duplicate object-type group using exact field/type matching criteria.
expectations.evidence: Mentions duplicate groups and exact matching criteria.

expectations.text: Output explicitly states that non-breaking behavior is the default and that breaking merges require opt-in.
expectations.evidence: Not clearly evidenced in output: Output explicitly states that non-breaking behavior is the default and that breaking merges require opt-in.

expectations.text: Output includes a per-group disposition (merged, implementation-only, or skipped) with rationale.
expectations.evidence: Not clearly evidenced in output: Output includes a per-group disposition (merged, implementation-only, or skipped) with rationale.
